code:
import io
import string
import list

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

mut maxes: List<Int> = []
mut cur = 0
mut has_cur = false
mut cur_max = 0
mut has_max = false

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if has_cur
      let new_max = if has_max
        if cur > cur_max
          cur
        else
          cur_max
        end
      else
        cur
      end
      maxes = list.push(maxes, new_max)
      cur_max = new_max
      has_max = true
      cur = 0
      has_cur = false
    end
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    has_cur = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for x in maxes
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
end
println(out)
